source_jobs.title: Buyer II
source_jobs.description:
About ANA: 
Join a recognized industry leader - Alliance North America was proudly named a 2025 Top Workplace in the Manufacturing Industry, an honor based entirely on feedback from our own employees about our culture, values, and workplace experience.
Alliance North America was established in 2017 and is proud to be the sole North American supplier of AIRMAN Power Generators, AIRMAN Air Compressors, and ANA’s patented EBOSS® Hybrid Energy System and Smart Load Bank System. Our commitment to our customers is to Make their World Easier, by answering the phone, understanding their needs, and taking ownership to provide them solutions. With a large parts inventory and more than 90% of all orders shipping within 24 hours, you never have to worry about spare parts. We help keep your fleet in top condition with our world class Support Department, who are always ready to help and be a resource by providing training on our equipment.
ANA is headquartered in Henderson, Nevada, with locations in Cypress, California, and Spartanburg, South Carolina. ANA is growing and scaling, and we are seeking a Buyer II to join our growing team in an on-site position in Henderson, Nevada.
As a Buyer II, you will manage complex purchasing categories and supplier relationships. This role balances transactional and tactical responsibilities — executing purchases, analyzing spend data, negotiating pricing, and supporting cost-saving initiatives. The Buyer II acts with limited supervision and contributes to process improvements and supplier management.
This position is fully onsite, and the work schedule is weekdays from 8:00 am – 5:00 pm. This role reports to the Purchasing Manager.

source_jobs.description:

Join a recognized industry leader - Alliance North America was proudly named a 2025 Top Workplace in the Manufacturing Industry, an honor based entirely on feedback from our own employees about our culture, values, and workplace experience.
 
Alliance North America was established in 2017 and is proud to be the sole North American supplier of AIRMAN Power Generators, AIRMAN Air Compressors, and ANA’s patented EBOSS® Hybrid Energy System and Smart load bank system.  Our commitment to our customers is to Make their World Easier, by answering the phone, understanding their needs, and taking ownership to provide them solutions. With a large parts inventory and more than 90% of all orders shipping within 24 hours, you never have to worry about spare parts. We help keep your fleet in top condition with our world class Support Department, who are always ready to help and be a resource by providing training on our equipment. 
 
ANA is headquartered in Henderson, Nevada with locations in Cypress, California and Spartanburg, South Carolina. ANA is growing and scaling and we are seeking a Client Infrastructure and Systems Administrator in an onsite position in Henderson, Nevada.  As a Client Infrastructure and Systems Administrator, you will have the opportunity to design, deploy, and manage enterprise network and Azure cloud environments, including security, automation, and service management platforms. 
 
The position is fully onsite, and the work schedule is weekdays from 8:00 AM-5:00 PM. This role reports to the IT Client Services Supervisor.

source_jobs.title: Electrical Compliance Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About ANA:  
Join a recognized industry leader - Alliance North America was proudly named a 2025 Top Workplace in the Manufacturing Industry, an honor based entirely on feedback from our own employees about our culture, values, and workplace experience.
 
Alliance North America was established in 2017 and is proud to be the sole North American supplier of AIRMAN Power Generators, AIRMAN Air Compressors, and ANA’s patented EBOSS® Hybrid Energy System and Smart Load Bank System.  Our commitment to our customers is to Make their World Easier, by answering the phone, understanding their needs, and taking ownership to provide them with solutions. With a large parts inventory and more than 90% of all orders shipping within 24 hours, you never have to worry about spare parts. We help keep your fleet in top condition with our world class Support Department, who are always ready to help and be a resource by providing training on our equipment. 
 
ANA is headquartered in Henderson, Nevada, with locations in Cypress, California and Spartanburg, South Carolina. ANA is growing and scaling, and we are seeking an Electrical Compliance Engineer in an onsite position in Henderson, Nevada.  
As an Electrical Compliance Engineer, you will work in our engineering team. In this role, you will lead the compliance and certification efforts for our industrial Hybrid Energy Systems, while actively assisting in the electrical and system design for our next-generation hybrid power generation systems. You will bridge the gap between cutting-edge electrical engineering and stringent regulatory frameworks. You will ensure that our products—from custom high-voltage battery packs to hybrid power systems—are physically tested, validated, and architected for compliance from day one.
 
The position is fully onsite, and the work schedule is weekdays from 8:00 AM-5:00 PM. This role reports to the Electrical Systems Engineer.

source_jobs.title: Inside Sales Coordinator
source_jobs.description:
About ANA:  
Join a recognized industry leader - Alliance North America was proudly named a 2025 Top Workplace in the Manufacturing Industry, an honor based entirely on feedback from our own employees about our culture, values, and workplace experience.
 
Alliance North America was established in 2017 and is proud to be the sole North American supplier of AIRMAN Power Generators, AIRMAN Air Compressors, and ANA’s patented EBOSS® Hybrid Energy System and Smart load bank system.  Our commitment to our customers is to Make their World Easier, by answering the phone, understanding their needs, and taking ownership to provide them solutions. With a large parts inventory and more than 90% of all orders shipping within 24 hours, you never have to worry about spare parts. We help keep your fleet in top condition with our world class Support Department, who are always ready to help and be a resource by providing training on our equipment.
 
ANA is headquartered in Henderson, Nevada with locations in Cypress, California and Spartanburg, South Carolina. ANA is growing and scaling and we are seeking an Inside Sales Coordinator in an onsite position at Spartanburg, SC. The Inside Sales Coordinator plays a critical role in supporting sales operations, customer experience, and order execution across the organization. This position serves as a key liaison between Sales, Operations, Logistics, Finance, and customers to ensure timely communication, accurate order processing, and exceptional service throughout the customer lifecycle.  
The ideal candidate is highly organized, customer-focused, detail-oriented, and thrives in a fast-paced environment with changing priorities and deadlines. This role requires strong communication skills, urgency, accountability, and the ability to proactively solve problems while supporting company goals and revenue objectives.  This role supports the EST timezone.
 
The position is fully onsite, and the work schedule is weekdays from 8:00 AM-5:00 PM. This role reports to the Inside Sales Manager.

source_jobs.title: Mechanical Design Engineer II
source_jobs.description:
About ANA:  
Join a recognized industry leader - Alliance North America was proudly named a 2025 Top Workplace in the Manufacturing Industry, an honor based entirely on feedback from our own employees about our culture, values, and workplace experience.
 
Alliance North America was established in 2017 and is proud to be the sole North American supplier of AIRMAN Power Generators, AIRMAN Air Compressors, and ANA’s patented EBOSS® Hybrid Energy System and Smart load bank system.  Our commitment to our customers is to Make their World Easier, by answering the phone, understanding their needs, and taking ownership to provide them solutions. With a large parts inventory and more than 90% of all orders shipping within 24 hours, you never have to worry about spare parts. We help keep your fleet in top condition with our world class Support Department, who are always ready to help and be a resource by providing training on our equipment.
 
ANA is headquartered in Henderson, Nevada, with locations in Cypress, California, and Spartanburg, South Carolina. ANA is growing and scaling, and we are seeking a Mechanical Design Engineer II in an onsite position in Henderson, Nevada. In this role, you will focus on the mid-level mechanical design, prototyping layout, and component integration within our hybrid energy systems and power equipment. 
This role requires a dedicated design approach to ensure our products meet or exceed quality standards while bridging the gap between initial concepts and scalable production. You will utilize your advanced CAD skills to lead product and accessory design for the equipment rental industry, managing projects with moderate independence while collaborating closely across the engineering team to optimize manufacturing processes.
The position is fully onsite, and the work schedule is weekdays from 8:00 AM-5:00 PM. This role reports to the Senior Mechanical Design Engineer.

source_jobs.description:

Alliance North America was established in 2017 and is proud to be the sole North American supplier of AIRMAN Power Generators, AIRMAN Air Compressors, and ANA’s patented EBOSS® Hybrid Energy System and Smart load bank system.  Our commitment to our customers is to Make their World Easier, by answering the phone, understanding their needs, and taking ownership to provide them solutions. ANA is headquartered in Henderson, Nevada with locations in Cypress, California and Spartanburg, South Carolina. ANA is growing and scaling and we are seeking a Process Engineer IIin an onsite position in Henderson, Nevada.  As a Process Engineer II, you will be responsible for developing, launching, and continuously improving assembly processes for generators, hybrid power systems, and compressors.  Strong focus on post-launch optimization, BOM/SOP improvement, and collaboration with Industrial Engineering.
 
The position is fully onsite, and the work schedule is weekdays from 8:00 AM-5:00 PM.

source_jobs.title: Technical Service Specialist
source_jobs.description:
About ANA:  
Alliance North America was established in 2017 and is proud to be the sole North American supplier of AIRMAN Power Generators, AIRMAN Air Compressors, MAC3 Pneumatic Air tools, and ANA’s exclusive Energy Boss ™ - Hybrid Energy System and Smart load bank system.  Our commitment to our customers is to Make their World Easier, by answering the phone, understanding their needs, and taking ownership to provide them solutions. With a large parts inventory and more than 90% of all orders shipping within 24 hours, you never have to worry about spare parts. We help keep your fleet in top condition with our world class Support Department, who are always ready to help and be a resource by providing training on our equipment.
ANA is headquartered in Henderson, Nevada, with locations in Cypress, California, and Spartanburg, South Carolina. ANA is growing and scaling, and we are seeking a Technical Service Specialist to join our growing team in an onsite position at the Spartanburg, South Carolina, location. The Technical Service Specialist serves all external and internal customers by receiving inbound calls and emails while providing technical support consisting of technical troubleshooting, tracking calls, and developing new processes and procedures to assist customers as needed.
The Technical Service Specialist role provides repair and maintenance help, along with warranty assistance to customers. A Technical Service Specialist will assist the parts department with part identification and preparation of parts that need service setup prior to shipment from the warehouse and customer use. A Technical Service Specialist is an excellent problem solver, an expert multitasker, and is process oriented.  The Technical Service Specialist is a good teacher who instills confidence in customers internally as well as externally through phone and email support. The role requires a customer first attitude that is trustworthy, kind, and can maintain a positive attitude in the face of angry and frustrated customers. The Technical Service Specialist has excellent computer skills and understands diesel engines, electrical generators, and air compressors.
The position is fully onsite, and the work schedule is weekdays at 8:00 am – 5:00 pm. You will occasionally travel up to 5% in local domestic travel.
This role reports to the Warranty & Technical Service Supervisor.

ANA is growing and scaling, and we are seeking a Technical Training Engineer in an onsite position in Henderson, NV. As a Technical Trainer II, you will have the opportunity to build the training and operator-certification programs that turn our engineering standards into a skilled, consistent production workforce, and help stand up training for new product lines as ANA continues to scale.
 
The position is fully onsite, and the work schedule is weekdays from 8:00 AM-5:00 PM. This role reports to the Director of Technical Functions.

notes: Manufacturing industry leader with a mix of technical and non-technical roles
